## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] Release / packaging

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally (or `pytest -q`)
- [ ] Lint/format checked if code changed (`make lint` / `make format`)
- [ ] [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md) updated under **Unreleased** (if user-facing)
- [ ] Version bump in `pyproject.toml` (release PRs only)
- [ ] Notebooks re-run or smoke-tested (if notebook changes)
